title: AI Safe Authoring Contract v1
description: Contract governing AI-chat authoring sessions across the Horror$Place VM-constellation. Ensures all generated artifacts declare target repo, path, schema, tier, and invariant/metric usage before CI validation.

sessionId.description: Opaque session identifier for this authoring run.

agentProfileId.description: ID of the AI agent profile performing authoring.

aiChatProfileId.description: ID of the AI-chat horror profile bounding this session's intensity.

mode.description: Authoring mode controlling available templates and validation rules.

artifacts.description: List of artifacts this session is permitted to create or modify.

objectKind.description: Kind of object being authored (matches constellation objectKinds).

targetRepo.description: Target repository for this artifact (must match constellation index).

path.description: Repository-relative path for the artifact; must be GitHub-compatible.

tier.description: Entitlement tier for this artifact; must be compatible with targetRepo role.

schemaRef.description: Canonical schema URI this artifact must validate against.

invariants_used.description: Invariant fields this artifact reads or writes; must be subset of canonical spine.

metrics_used.description: Entertainment metric fields this artifact reads or writes; must be subset of canonical spine.

referencedIds.description: IDs of other artifacts this one links to (regions, events, bundles, proofs).

governance.description: Optional governance metadata for audit and entitlement checks.

requiresDeadLedgerRef.description: If true, artifacts with intensityband >= 8 must include deadledgerref.

maxIntensityBand.description: Maximum intensity band (0-10) allowed for artifacts in this session.

allowedTemplateIds.description: Optional whitelist of ai-chat-template-contract IDs this session may use.
